title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 31. LOUISIANA CYBERSECURITY

INFORMATION SHARING ACT

§2101. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Cybersecurity Information Sharing Act".

            Acts 2019, No. 187, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 31.  LOUISIANA CYBERSECURITY
INFORMATION SHARING ACT
§2101.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Cybersecurity
Information Sharing Act".
Acts 2019, No. 187, §1.
